name: qrcode.react
usage_summary: Used in one component: packages/ui-extensions-dev-console/src/sections/Extensions/components/QRCodeModal/QRCodeModal.tsx. Imports QRCodeCanvas (aliased as QRCode) and renders a 170×170 QR code for extension preview URLs (mobile and POS deep-links). No subpath imports.
how_to_remove: Replace with the `qrcode` package (pure Node/browser, no React wrapper) and render the QR code into a or via a useEffect, or switch to the lighter `react-qr-code` (SVG-based, zero extra deps). The QRCodeModal component is self-contained (~100 LOC) so the change is isolated to that one file.
replacement_reason: react-qr-code is SVG-based, has no peer-deps beyond React, is actively maintained, and the API is a near-identical drop-in (). Alternatively, if the team wants to remove all wrapper libs, the bare `qrcode` package can generate a data-URL rendered in an tag with ~5 lines of useEffect.
